gist.headline: The Daily Buzz
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through the README to keep the latest news and apps fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page up-to-date with the latest community creations and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot with a monitor head pinning new polaroids to a corkboard, representing the daily update of news and apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning fresh polaroid photos to a wooden notice board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small pushpin. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning fresh polaroid photos to a wooden notice board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small pushpin.
